Watch & Learn

See the
Ancient Process
in Action

From the karite tree to the final hand-shaped butter ball — watch our women carry out the same traditional shea-making process passed down for generations in Tumu, Ghana.

Request a Sample
2018
Founded
Our Cooperative

Where Ancient
Craft Meets Purpose

The Sissala Shea Cooperative was founded in January 2018 to unite shea butter producers across the Sissala District. Operating in Tumu and Kandia in Ghana's Upper West Region, we bring together over 100 skilled women — the backbone of Ghana's shea tradition.

Working with our social enterprise partner Superior Shea, we produce raw, unrefined, Grade 1 shea butter using traditional African methods. 50% of all sales profits flow directly back: funding healthcare, education, farmland cultivation, and community infrastructure.

Our members aren't just producers — they're co-owners of a vision, building a future where rural Ghanaian women hold economic power.

🌿
100% Organic
No pesticides, no chemicals. Pure product from wild karite trees.
⚖️
Fair Trade
Every transaction ensures fair wages and dignified livelihoods.
🤝
Direct Source
No middlemen — trade directly with the women who made it.
💛
Community First
50% of profits reinvested into healthcare, schools & infrastructure.
01
Cracking the Nuts
Hand-cracked using traditional tools — preserving every nutrient
02
Stone Grinding
Ground on ancestral grindstones — releasing the natural oils
03
Fire Processing
Slow-cooked over open fire — the age-old way to extract pure butter
04
Pure Shea Butter
Fresh, raw, Grade 1 — no additives, no shortcuts, no compromise

"With every purchase of our product, your money directly impacts the lives of rural Ghanaian women and children."

Our Product

Raw Shea Butter,
As Nature Intended

We produce one thing — and we do it with uncompromising excellence. Raw, unrefined, Grade 1 shea butter handcrafted using traditional African methods. Available in bulk for direct trade with businesses, manufacturers, and brands worldwide.

Flagship Product
Raw Unrefined
Shea Butter

Handcrafted by the women of the Sissala Shea Cooperative using generations-old methods. Ivory to golden, rich in vitamins A & E, loaded with natural fatty acids. No additives. No shortcuts. Shea the way it has always been made.

GradeGrade 1 (Highest)
TypeRaw, Unrefined
OriginTumu, Upper West Ghana
ProcessingTraditional Handcraft

Seeking Direct Trade Buyers

Our raw shea is the perfect base for brands building finished products. Whip it, infuse it, formulate it — finest raw material, straight from source.

🧴
Cosmetics & Skincare

Launch your own shea line. Grade 1 raw material as your premium foundation for body butters, creams, lip balms, hair treatments.

e.g. Whipped butters, infused blends, skincare formulations
🏭
Manufacturers & Formulators

Consistent bulk supply for cosmetic manufacturers, ingredient distributors, and formulators requiring traceable organic shea at scale.

e.g. 100kg+ per order, ongoing supply agreements
🍫
Food & Confectionery

Premium shea as cocoa butter equivalent in chocolate and confectionery. Food-grade, traceable, organic-certified.

e.g. Chocolate, bakery ingredients, cooking fats
What We Offer

Services for Every
Business Need

The Sissala Shea Cooperative operates as a direct trade partner — not a retail brand. We serve businesses, buyers, and investors who want to engage authentically with the source.

01
📦
Bulk Direct Trade

Raw, unrefined shea direct from our cooperative. Minimum 100kg, shipped internationally from Ghana. No brokers, no markups, full traceability.

  • Minimum order: 100 kg
  • Custom bulk packaging
  • FOB pricing from Accra / Tamale
  • Consistent quality across batches
  • Volume discounts for 500 kg+
02
🚀
Launch Your Own Shea Line

We supply the premium raw material — you build the brand. Perfect foundation for body butters, skincare, and food products.

  • Base for whipped shea products
  • Suitable for infused & specialty lines
  • Organic & fair trade documentation
  • Full supply chain transparency
  • Use our cooperative story as your asset
03
🔬
Quality & Certification

Full documentation for importers and brands — certificates of origin, organic certification, batch quality reports.

  • Certificate of Origin — Ghana
  • Organic certification docs
  • Fair trade compliance records
  • Batch testing & quality analysis
  • Phytosanitary certificates
04
🤝
Impact Partnership

For organizations aligning procurement with ESG goals, or investors seeking community-level impact in West Africa.

  • ESG-aligned sourcing programs
  • Co-branding & storytelling rights
  • Impact reporting & transparency
  • Community investment agreements
  • NGO & foundation partnerships
Why Source With Us

The Competitive
Advantage of
Direct Trade

The global shea market is projected to reach $6.8B by 2035. Organic, fair trade, traceable supply is now the baseline buyers demand — we offer all of this, plus a story that sells.

Start a Conversation
01
No Middlemen, Better Margins
Eliminate markup layers by sourcing directly — better cost without compromising quality or ethics.
02
Traceability You Can Prove
Know exactly which village, which women, which season. Full transparency for compliance and consumer trust.
03
A Story That Converts
100+ women, a karite tree, centuries of tradition — a marketing asset you can own.
04
Grade 1 Consistency
Traditional processing maximizes bioactive retention — richer fatty acid profile than commercial alternatives.
05
ESG & Impact Credentials
Support women's empowerment, healthcare, and education in rural Ghana — independently verifiable for ESG reporting.
For Investors & Funders

Invest in the
Root of It All

The Sissala Shea Cooperative represents a proven model of sustainable, women-led development in rural West Africa. The global shea butter market stands at $3.1 billion in 2025, growing at 8.2% annually. Demand for organic, fair trade, traceable shea from certified cooperatives is outpacing supply.

📈
Production Expansion
Capital to expand capacity, acquire processing machinery, and grow membership across the Sissala District.
🏫
Education Infrastructure
Funding to build a secondary school in Tumu — a flagship investment for our producers' children.
💧
Community Infrastructure
Wells, storage facilities, farming equipment, and healthcare support for all members.
